data.title: Ohio launches new initiative to address critical shortages in behavioral health workforce with over 2.4 professionals needed.
data.description: A new awareness campaign has been launched in Ohio as part of the state's extensive initiative to attract and retain additional professionals in the expanding field. The campaign, rolled out in Columbus on July 17, 2025, responds to the increasing need for behavioral health services, which currently surpasses the available workforce by over 2.4...

data.title: PS Miner launches cloud mining for Solana (SOL) holders, enabling passive income without selling holdings. SOL upgraded network for 100,000 transactions/sec. Users can mine Ethereum, Litecoin, earn high daily returns without liquidating. PS Miner offers new profit strategies for SOL. SOL-based user registrations grow by over 250%.
data.description: In Eastleigh, England, the world's leading cloud mining platform, PS Miner, has introduced a new mining platform for Solana (SOL), aiming to provide specialized assistance to users. This initiative offers a novel method for users to generate passive income through crypto mining while retaining their core holdings. The introduction aligns with SOL's progression as a significant DeFi infrastructure asset. After a recent network upgrade, SOL can now facilitate over 100,000 transactions per second and incorporate advanced zero-knowledge proofs. PS Miner enables SOL holders to transform their dormant assets into mining contracts, allowing them to earn substantial daily profits by mining assets like Ethereum and Litecoin without needing to sell their SOL tokens. This launch marks the commencement of a new phase of profit opportunities for SOL. The platform has experienced a remarkable increase of over 250% in SOL-based user registrations, indicating strong interest in the new features that will redefine DeFi profit strategies.

data.title: Franklin Mint FCU named in Forbes 2025 America's Best-In-State Credit Unions list for 2nd year, among 222 top credit unions.
data.description: Franklin Mint Federal Credit Union, based in Chadds Ford, Pennsylvania, has been recently selected as one of the top "America's Best-In-State Credit Unions" by Forbes for the second year in a row. This prestigious recognition places FMFCU among a select group of 222 credit unions across the country. The achievement emphasizes the institution's commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

data.title: Integrity partners with Alliance Arete Financial for growth, gaining access to new products and tech. - July 17, 2025.
data.description: A reputable agency is transitioning into a period of significant growth by embracing Integrity's comprehensive vision. As of July 17, 2025, in Dallas, the agency is set to explore new horizons with access to a range of innovative products, state-of-the-art technology, and transformative service offerings. This move marks a pivotal moment for the agency as it gears up to expand and elevate its operations to the next level.

data.title: NYCRC provides $19M in funding for 9th charter school in NYC, Bold Charter School in the Bronx.
data.description: A recent transaction has been successfully completed to support the construction of Bold Charter School, a 700-student facility located in the Bronx, New York. The New York City Regional Center has finalized $19 million in New Market Tax Credit financing to aid in funding the project. This development marks a significant step towards the completion of the school, providing essential resources for its construction.

data.title: US June retail sales up 0.6%, reaching $720.1B; consumers boost spending despite tariffs and borrowing costs.
data.description: June saw a surprising increase in retail sales, with a 0.6% rise from the previous month, defying expectations after two consecutive decreases. The U.S. Census Bureau reported that retail and food services sales reached $720.1 billion in June, reflecting a 0.6% uptick from May and a 3.9% surge compared to last year. This rebound surpassed economist predictions of a 0.1% growth. Notable sectors driving this growth were miscellaneous store retailers (up 1.8%), motor vehicles and parts dealers (up 1.2%), and building material and garden equipment stores (up 0.9%). Food services and grocery stores experienced a 0.5% increase, while online retailers saw a 0.4% rise. However, department stores faced a decline of 0.8%, along with furniture and electronics (both down 0.1%). This recovery in retail sales serves as a positive indicator of consumer resilience amid concerns such as increased borrowing rates and trade uncertainties.

data.title: Progressive Corp (NYSE: PGR) reported Q2 earnings of $4.88 per share, missing sales estimate of $20.310B. Analysts cut their forecasts. Shares fell 0.3% to $245.74 on Thursday. B of A...
data.description: Progressive Corporation (NYSE: PGR) announced its second-quarter results, revealing earnings of $4.88 per share, surpassing the expected $4.29 per share. Sales for the quarter were reported at $20.310 billion, slightly below the estimated $20.550 billion. Following the announcement, Progressive's shares experienced a 0.3% decline, trading at $245.74 on Thursday. Analysts adjusted their price targets for Progressive post-earnings. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Globex Mining Enterprises Inc. is advancing work on the Mont Sorcier Iron Royalty Property in Quebec.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, GLOBEX MINING ENTERPRISES INC. (GMX on the Toronto Stock Exchange, G1MN on various European stock exchanges, and GLBXF on the OTCQX International in the US) shared an update from Cerrado Gold Inc. regarding progress at the Mont Sorcier Iron/vanadium project near Chibougamau, Quebec. In a recent press release, Cerrado reported the latest developments surrounding the project.

data.title: RGB Protocol plans to introduce tokenized assets and USDT to Bitcoin. Boosty Labs CEO stated Tether’s USDT as RGB’s initial use case for stablecoin transactions on BTC.
data.description: Viktor Ihnatiuk, the founder and CEO of Boosty Labs, shared with a news outlet that Tether's USDT will serve as the inaugural real-world application for stablecoin transactions on Bitcoin for RGB.

data.title: BTCFi TVL soars to $7B, with trust concerns despite 22x surge from Jan 2024, driven by protocols & institutional investment.
data.description: Bitcoin-based decentralized finance, BTCFi, has seen a significant increase of more than 2200% in its Total Value Locked (TVL) since January 2024. This drastic surge is attributed to the introduction of new protocols and a notable increase in institutional investments. However, despite this growth, BTCFi continues to encounter challenges in adoption primarily due to concerns surrounding trust within the platform.

data.title: Battery Ventures promotes Justin Rosner to partner, announces a dozen internal promotions. Also promotes four new principals.
data.description: Battery Ventures, an international technology investment firm, recently revealed a significant announcement regarding internal promotions. The firm, with offices in Boston, New York, San Francisco, and Tel Aviv in Israel, disclosed nearly twelve advancements within its team. Notably, Justin Rosner, known for expertise in industrial technology and life-science tools, was promoted to the position of partner. Additionally, Battery appointed four new principals within its venture-capital and private-equity sectors, showcasing its commitment to nurturing talent from within. This move underscores the firm's dedication to recognizing and advancing its professionals, contributing to its strong leadership foundation.

data.title: PNC Financial Services reported Q2 earnings of $3.85 per share, beating estimates of $3.53 per share. Quarterly sales were $5.661 billion, exceeding analyst expectations of $5.606 billion, prompting analysts to raise forecasts.CEO expects FY 2025 revenue to increase by 6%.
data.description: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) announced impressive second-quarter earnings surpassing expectations. Quarterly earnings stood at $3.85 per share, outperforming the estimated $3.53 per share. Moreover, the company's quarterly sales reached $5.661 billion, beating the anticipated $5.606 billion. PNC foresees a 6% annual revenue growth for FY 2025. Bill Demchak, Chairman and CEO of PNC, highlighted the success of the national growth strategy with an increase in new customer acquisition. For more information, the complete news is accessible on Benzinga.com.
